title: Successful Cut — 4-week paired cut with Kyle
html:
TL;DR

  • A 4-week aggressive cut Yahir paired with kyle nguyen in early Feb 2024 — target loss 2.2-3.2 lbs/week, ~40% under maintenance, total 8.8-12.8 lbs.
  • Explicit framing: "This doesn't imply losing water weight then gaining it back with rehydration, I am referencing our true weight." The math is for actual fat loss, not rebound water.
  • Doc references screenshots of both Yahir's and Kyle's maintenance calories (likely from a TDEE calculator) — embedded as images.
  • The shortest of Yahir's fitness docs but a clean expression of the paired discipline pattern: fitness goals work better when contracted between two people who can hold each other accountable.
  • Direct lineage to brotein (the fitness-to-software project) — same instinct of measurable, paired, calibrated fitness work.

What this is

A two-paragraph doc setting the contract for a paired cut between Yahir and kyle nguyen in February 2024. The substance is small but the frame is dense:

"Get excited for this cut, the end results are going to be sick. Plan is the following: lose between 2.2-3.2 lbs every week for 4 weeks, meaning going ~40% under maintenance calories. Total of 8.8 - 12.8 lbs in the end. This doesn't imply losing water weight then gaining it back with rehydration, I am referencing our true weight."

The pre-emptive disclaimer about water weight is the most telling line — Yahir is differentiating "real" fat loss from the pseudo-progress of cutting + rehydrating. This is the anabolic scoring mindset showing up in cutting form: it doesn't count if it isn't measurable and durable.

Why it matters in the graph

This is a lineage entry in Yahir's fitness arc:

  • Paired structure (Yahir + Kyle) → the paired discipline motif that recurs in brotein (originally a fitness-tracking app concept)
  • 40%-under-maintenance aggression → matches the no runway discipline thread Yahir applies to other domains (founder finance, time-allocation)
  • Target precision (2.2-3.2 lbs/week, total 8.8-12.8 lbs) → calibrated, not vibes-based

The doc is also a small entity-confirmation for kyle nguyen as a recurring fitness partner — they show up together across multiple summaries, this one specifically anchoring a Feb 2024 paired cut.

The fitness-to-software arc is already a synthesis page — from fitness to software the brotein arc. This summary extends that arc one notch earlier (pre-Brotein, Yahir doing the actual work that later inspires the product).

Privacy

No credentials. Two TDEE-screenshot images are referenced but the calorie numbers themselves are in image data — left in raw, not surfaced.
